scripts.sync:auth-ui-css: cp packages/ui/src/styles/components.css auth-service/public/assets/orasage-ui.css && sed -i '1,/^$/d' auth-service/public/assets/orasage-ui.css && sed -i '1i/** Synced from @orasage/ui — tokens via style.css */' auth-service/public/assets/orasage-ui.css
scripts.sync:fortune-ui-css: npm run sync:auth-ui-css && mkdir -p bazi/client/src/assets ziwei/app/assets && tail -n +7 packages/ui/src/styles/components.css > bazi/client/src/assets/orasage-ui.css && cp bazi/client/src/assets/orasage-ui.css ziwei/app/assets/orasage-ui.css && sed -i '1i/** Synced from @orasage/ui — load after orasage-tokens */' bazi/client/src/assets/orasage-ui.css ziwei/app/assets/orasage-ui.css
